title: Helpers--Roofers
description: Help roofers by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include using, supplying, or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.text: Check to ensure that completed roofs are watertight.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sweep and clean roofs to prepare them for the application of new roofing materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate worn or torn areas in roofs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cover roofs with layers of roofing felt or asphalt strips before installing tile, slate, or composition materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unload materials and tools from work trucks, and unroll roofing as directed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set ladders, scaffolds, and hoists in place for taking supplies to roofs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place tiles, nail them to roof boards, and cover nailheads with roofing cement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to skilled roofers installing and repairing roofs, flashings, and surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach roofing paper and composition shingles, using nails.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform emergency leak repairs and general maintenance for a variety of roof types.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attach sheets of metal to roof boards or building frameworks when installing metal roofs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hoist tar and roofing materials to roofs, using ropes and pulleys, or carry materials up ladders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply shingles, gravel, or asphalt over the top layer of tar to protect the roofing material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Chop tar into small pieces, and heat chopped tar in kettles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clear drains and downspouts and clean gutters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
